description_long: This nightstand features a unique, multi-tiered circular design with three interconnected round tabletops at varying heights. Two of the surfaces have a light, pearlescent finish resembling mother-of-pearl, while the third is a rich, reddish-brown wood grain. The tabletops are supported by slender, dark metal legs that are angled outward for stability and connected by thin metal rods. The overall structure is open and airy, with no visible drawers or enclosed storage. Its modern, sculptural appearance makes it suitable for contemporary urban interiors or stylish public spaces.
description: A modern nightstand with three circular, multi-level surfaces—two in pearlescent white and one in reddish-brown wood—supported by slender dark metal legs.
description_view_0: View 0 highlights the three circular surfaces at different heights, with the reddish-brown tabletop in the foreground and the two lighter surfaces behind.
description_view_1: View 1 shows the largest pearlescent surface most prominently, with the reddish-brown and smallest white surfaces partially visible.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the smallest white surface in the foreground, with the other two surfaces receding, emphasizing the tiered arrangement.
description_view_3: View 3 places the reddish-brown surface at the front, with the two lighter surfaces behind, showing the angled legs and connecting rods clearly.
attribute_leg_design: slender angled metal legs with round feet
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside seating or in lounge areas
